shots.prompt: Detective office, evidence wall glowing. İhsan, in his overcoat, leans over Kaan's shoulder. İhsan says in English: 'I planted a fake target in the data. Only our team can see it. If the killer bites...' Kaan, tech analyst in glasses, finishes in English: '...then it's one of us.' Tense, blue monitor glow.

Neon livestream studio at night. Mira, glamorous and tense, stares at her glowing phone where a fresh black-heart has appeared. She says in English, voice shaking: 'İhsan, the heart — it just appeared on the decoy. But this account... only Kaan set it up.' Eerie glow.

İhsan alone before the evidence wall, dawning dread on his face. He says in English, slow and quiet: 'Kaan built every dashboard. Kaan traced every clue. Kaan was always... already there.' Deep shadows, single warm lamp.

Office, close on Kaan typing at glowing monitors, calm and confident. Kaan says in English: 'I already know where he'll strike next.' İhsan, standing behind him in the shadows, replies coldly in English: 'I never told you the location.' Kaan's typing stops. Tension snaps.

İhsan and Kaan face each other in the dim office, a silent standoff. İhsan asks in English, low: 'How did you know, Kaan?' Kaan, after a cold pause, answers in English with a faint smile: 'Lucky guess.' Charged, ominous, blue glow.

Rain-slick neon street. Mira grips İhsan's arm, terrified, and warns in English: 'Your partner knows things no one should. İhsan — what if the man hunting us has been in the room the whole time?' Urgent, magenta-teal light.

Kaan alone in the office, lit by a single monitor. He slowly removes his glasses, a cold smile forming, and says softly to himself in English: 'They erased me once. Now I decide who trends... and who disappears.' Chilling, shadowy reveal-in-progress.

Detective İhsan in the neon night, holding the glowing phone, turns to camera and says in English: 'Every clue points to the one man I trusted most. Is Kaan the killer? Tell me before the finale. Part five tomorrow.' Dramatic, slow push-in.
